description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the php:7.1 Docker image with a mysql:5.7 service and define MYSQL_DATABASE and MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD variables for the database. In a global before_script download phpunit 7.1.0 to /usr/local/bin/phpunit, make it executable, install the mysqli extension, and append a db_server definition to tests/db_config.php. Add a test job (default stage) named test that runs phpunit --bootstrap tests/bootstrap.php tests. The pipeline has no caches, artifacts, or conditional rules.
